violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Observed food in refrigerator with no date marking.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle. -Observed lid of waste container in Women's restroom was under the waste container.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed duct tape on floor in food prep area. Duct tape is not a cleanable material.
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
